archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Mode + Neo-Brutalist Terminal

core_principles: No rounded corners. Everything is a rigid rectangle with 1px solid borders.
Data over decoration. Omit gradients, soft shadows, and glassmorphism. Use raw, exposed structure.
High contrast text hierarchy. Huge brutalist headers paired with microscopic data tables.
Unforgiving, precise, and fast. The aesthetic should feel like an institutional quant trading terminal.
anti_patterns_avoided: Generic 'SaaS' soft dark mode with muddy greys.
Rounded floating cards. We use border-collapse style grids instead.

headings.usage: Used strictly for panel titles, macro stats, and the giant signal displays. Must be tracking-tight.

data_and_body.usage: Mandatory for all numbers, prices, timestamps, logs, and AI outputs. Ensures vertical alignment in tables.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, edge-to-edge.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radii: CRITICAL: `rounded-none` on EVERYTHING. Use `border border-zinc-800` on all panels. No spacing (`gap-0`) between grid items if using a border-collapse layout, or standard `gap-4` with 1px borders if using standard grid.
layout_structure: Top Bar: Bot Status, Current PnL, Start/Stop toggle (1 row).
Main Display: 3-column grid. Left 2 columns = BTC/USDT Chart. Right 1 column = MASSIVE Signal Block & RSI/EMA Gauges.
Middle Display: 3-column grid. Left 1 column = Order Book. Middle/Right 2 columns = AI Market Analysis Terminal.
Bottom Display: Full width Trade History Log Table.

bot_status.style: Minimalist header. 'STATUS: ACTIVE' with a blinking green dot (`animate-pulse bg-[#00FF41]`).

buttons.style: Flat, 1px border. `border-zinc-50 bg-transparent text-zinc-50`. Hover: Invert colors (`bg-zinc-50 text-black`). No rounded corners.

chart.style: Line or Area chart. Remove grid lines entirely or make them extremely faint (`stroke-zinc-900`). Axis text in `text-xs font-mono`. Use pure white `#FFFFFF` for the line to emphasize rawness, or `#00FF41`/`#FF003C` depending on 24h trend.
chart.tooltip: Black background, 1px white border, mono text.

trading_signal.style: The most prominent element. A large box with `border-2` (using the signal color). Inside: `STRONG BUY`, `SELL`, or `WAIT` in `text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black`.

gauges_indicators.style: Raw progress bars (`h-2 rounded-none bg-zinc-900`). Overlaid with the current value in monospace (e.g., `RSI: 72.4 [OVERBOUGHT]`). Color-code the text based on the threshold.

ai_analysis_terminal.style: Mimics a command-line interface. `bg-black border border-zinc-800 p-4`. Text is `text-sm font-mono text-zinc-400`. The latest AI insight is white or green. Add a blinking block cursor `█` at the end.

order_book_and_logs.style: Dense tabular data. `table-auto w-full`. `border-b border-zinc-900` on rows. Right-align numbers. Color the Ask prices red, Bid prices green.

motion.philosophy: Instant and functional. No slow, sweeping animations.
motion.transitions: Hover states use `transition-colors duration-75`. Very snappy.
motion.data_updates: If a number changes, flash its background white for 100ms, then fade back (mimics Bloomberg terminal tick updates).

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons sparingly. Prefer text labels (e.g., `[ PLAY ]` instead of a play triangle). If icons are used, stroke width must be 1.5 or 2, sharp geometric shapes.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, forms, and data panels MUST have `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="start-bot-button"`, `data-testid="signal-display"`, `data-testid="ai-terminal-log"`).
